title: PeerTyping.chat_id and PeerRetract.message_id unbounded
description: PeerTyping.chat_id and PeerRetract.message_id are bare String fields with no serde deserialization bound. PeerReceipt.at and PeerDeliver.*_id fields are correctly guarded by deserialize_bounded_id, but these two variants missed the same treatment. Trigger: craft a PeerTyping or PeerRetract message with a multi-MiB chat_id or message_id. Bad outcome: unbounded heap allocation before any application-layer check runs.
